label: Diminished positive emotional response to pleasant events
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, when something pleasant happened, how much did you feel pleasure or positive emotion? (1 = not at all, 9 = a lot)

label: Guilt about not enjoying positive experiences
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you feel guilty or self-critical about not enjoying something you experienced? (1 = not at all, 9 = extremely)

label: Behavioral autopilot / low moment-to-moment engagement
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how often did you do things in an automatic or 'on autopilot' way (mindless, not present)? (1 = not at all/present, 9 = entirely on autopilot)

label: General emotional blunting (low affect intensity)
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how intense were your emotions overall (both positive and negative)? (1 = not intense/very blunted, 9 = very intense)

label: External presentation of being 'fine' despite internal disengagement
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how much did you present or act as if you were 'fine' while feeling different inside? (1 = not at all, 9 = a lot)

label: Reduced motivation/interest to pursue non-routine pleasurable activities
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how motivated were you to do something enjoyable beyond routine obligations? (1 = not at all motivated, 9 = highly motivated)

label: Behavioral activation (intentional pleasurable activity engagement)
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you intentionally do a planned/enjoyable activity? Rate how engaged you were: 1 = not at all, 9 = fully engaged.

label: Savoring / positive-event noticing
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you intentionally notice or savor any pleasant moment? (1 = not at all, 9 = very much)

label: Self-compassion / reduced self-criticism
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you respond to yourself with compassion rather than self-criticism? (1 = entirely self-critical, 9 = entirely self-compassionate)

label: Momentary present-moment awareness (mindfulness)
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how present and aware were you of what you were doing? (1 = not at all, 9 = completely present)

label: Micro-activation (5-minute energizers / small wins)
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you do a short energizing activity (5 minutes) and how energizing was it? (1 = not at all, 9 = very energizing)

label: Sleep quality / last-night restoration (morning diary)
measurement_item_or_signal: How well did you sleep last night / how restorative was your sleep? (1 = very poor, 9 = very restorative)

label: Social connection / brief social contact
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how connected did you feel to others or did you have meaningful social contact? (1 = not at all, 9 = very connected)

label: Phone screen-time minutes (passive) — proxy for autopilot/distracted behavior
measurement_channel: phone OS usage API (minutes screen ON/unlocked) aggregated in-app
measurement_item_or_signal: Total phone screen time minutes since previous prompt (auto-logged via OS usage API)

label: Social avoidance behavior
measurement_item_or_signal: Today, to what extent did you avoid or withdraw from social activities (declined, did not attend, or withdrew) because of worries about how others saw you?
measurement_scale_or_unit: 1-9 Likert (1 = Not at all, 9 = Very much)

label: Belief 'I am annoying'
measurement_item_or_signal: Today, how strongly did you hold the belief 'I am annoying' or expect others to react unfavorably?
measurement_scale_or_unit: 1-9 Likert (1 = Not at all, 9 = Extremely strongly)

label: Post-event rumination about social remarks
measurement_item_or_signal: How much did you replay or get stuck on things you said in social situations (e.g., 'why did I say that?') today?
measurement_scale_or_unit: 1-9 Likert (1 = Not at all, 9 = A great deal)

label: Plan cancellation frequency/impact
measurement_item_or_signal: Today, how much did you cancel or withdraw from planned social engagements (and how impactful was it for you)?
measurement_scale_or_unit: 1-9 Likert (1 = None/not impactful, 9 = Many cancellations/high impact)

label: Experienced loneliness from reduced social contact
measurement_item_or_signal: How lonely did you feel today as a result of reduced social contact?
measurement_scale_or_unit: 1-9 Likert (1 = Not at all lonely, 9 = Extremely lonely)

label: Self-critical reaction to loneliness
measurement_item_or_signal: When you felt lonely today, how much did you respond with self-criticism or calling yourself 'dumb' for being lonely?
measurement_scale_or_unit: 1-9 Likert (1 = Not at all, 9 = Extremely self-critical)

label: Behavioral activation / social exposure (behavioral experiments)
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you purposefully attempt to engage with others or accept/attend social opportunities (graded steps/exposures)?
measurement_scale_or_unit: 1-9 Likert (1 = Not at all, 9 = A great deal)

label: Cognitive restructuring / thought-challenging for 'I'm annoying'
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you actively challenge or reframe thoughts like 'I'm annoying'?
measurement_scale_or_unit: 1-9 Likert (1 = Not at all, 9 = A great deal)

label: Rumination-interruption / mindfulness-decentering (post-event decompression)
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how often were you able to step out of replaying social interactions (interrupt or let go of ruminative thoughts)?
measurement_scale_or_unit: 1-9 Likert (1 = Not at all, 9 = Very often/successfully)

label: Micro-connection planning (stepwise reengagement / social-prescribing micro-contacts)
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you attempt small, intentional social connections (texts, short calls, brief in-person micro-interactions)?
measurement_scale_or_unit: 1-9 Likert (1 = Not at all, 9 = Many/very engaged)

label: Self-compassion practice (response to self-criticism)
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you respond to self-critical thoughts with compassionate statements or soothing actions?
measurement_scale_or_unit: 1-9 Likert (1 = Not at all, 9 = Very much)

label: Sleep quality / circadian alignment (last night)
measurement_item_or_signal: How well did you sleep last night overall?

label: Social support mobilization (asking for help / confiding)
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you seek support or confide in someone about how you were feeling?
measurement_scale_or_unit: 1-9 Likert (1 = Not at all, 9 = A great deal)

label: Passive social-activity (outgoing contacts / social app minutes) — daily aggregate
measurement_channel: smartphone (permissioned activity logs or aggregate counts) / behavioral_log
measurement_item_or_signal: Daily count of outgoing social interactions (calls + distinct addressed messages) and minutes spent in social communication apps (24h aggregate).

label: Baseline health-related worry frequency/intensity
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how much have you worried about your health? (1 = Not at all, 9 = Extremely)

label: Catastrophic interpretation of minor bodily symptoms
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, if you noticed bodily sensations, to what extent did you interpret them as indicating something very serious (e.g., convinced you might be dying)? (1 = Not at all, 9 = Completely)
measurement_scale_or_unit: 1-9 Likert (anchored) plus conditional event flag if no sensation

label: Compulsive online health-checking (duration)
measurement_channel: smartphone EMA app + optional passive phone sensor
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you search for health information online? If yes, how many minutes did you spend? (enter minutes). Also rate how strong the urge was on a 1-9 scale (1 = No urge, 9 = Very strong urge).

label: Failure to inhibit checking despite recognizing irrationality
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you try and fail to resist checking/searching even though you knew it was irrational? (1 = Not at all, 9 = Completely)

label: Subjective sense of loss of control and distress about it
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how much did you feel that your health worries were out of control and how distressed did that make you? (1 = Not at all, 9 = Extremely)

label: Acute panic-level fear when a symptom appears
measurement_item_or_signal: If you noticed a bodily symptom since the last prompt, how intense was your immediate fear/panic? (1 = Not at all, 9 = Extreme panic). Also mark event_flag if a symptom occurred.

label: Cognitive restructuring / probabilistic thinking practice
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you use a cognitive reappraisal/probability-checking strategy? If yes, rate how effective it was (1=Not at all,9=Very effective) and record minutes spent practicing.
measurement_scale_or_unit: binary + 1-9 Likert for effectiveness + minutes practiced

label: Scheduled checking & digital hygiene (if-then plans and limits)
measurement_channel: smartphone EMA app + optional passive phone sensor
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you check health information outside scheduled windows? (Y/N). Self-reported minutes spent searching and perceived adherence to schedule on 1-9 scale. Passive proxy: browser_time_minutes_since_last_prompt and screen_unlock_count.
measurement_scale_or_unit: binary + minutes + 1-9 adherence Likert; passive minutes if available

label: Interoceptive exposure to feared bodily sensations
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you practice interoceptive exposure exercises? (Y/N). If yes, minutes practiced and peak fear during exercise (1-9).

label: Mindfulness/acceptance & distress-tolerance skills
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you use a mindfulness/acceptance or breathing exercise? If yes, how many minutes and rate immediate relief (1-9).

label: Executive function / inhibition training (urge pause & response prevention)
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you use an urge-pause/inhibition exercise when you felt the urge to check? (Y/N). If yes, rate success resisting (1-9) and minutes practiced.

label: Sleep and circadian stabilization
measurement_item_or_signal: Morning diary: last night's sleep onset time, wake time, sleep quality (1-9). Also nightly adherence to sleep routine (1-9). Optional passive: sleep_duration_minutes via wearable / phone (if available).

label: Social support & accountability mechanisms
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you reach out to or receive a supportive/check-in message from your accountability partner? (Y/N). Rate perceived helpfulness 1-9 and whether they reminded you of your plan (Y/N).

label: Elevated resting muscle tension in shoulders and jaw
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how tense were your shoulders and jaw? (1 = not at all tense, 9 = extremely tense)

label: Low moment-to-moment awareness of bodily tension
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how aware were you of bodily tension or tightness (shoulders, jaw or neck)? (1 = not at all aware, 9 = very aware)

label: Headaches triggered by muscular tension
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you have a headache? (Yes/No). If yes, rate intensity: 1 = very mild, 9 = very severe.

label: Persistent anticipatory threat expectation
measurement_item_or_signal: Right now / Since the last prompt, how much did you expect something bad to happen? (1 = not at all, 9 = extremely)

label: Difficulty relaxing on low-stress days
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how hard was it for you to relax (physically or mentally)? (1 = not at all hard, 9 = extremely hard)

label: Habitual anticipatory muscle bracing in absence of immediate threat
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how much did you notice automatic bracing/tensing (muscles activating without a clear reason)? (1 = none, 9 = constant unintended bracing)

label: Progressive muscle relaxation (PMR) practice (shoulders/jaw-focused)
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you do a PMR/targeted muscle relaxation practice? If yes, estimate total minutes and rate how fully you engaged (1-9).

label: Interoceptive body-scan / mindful-body awareness check-ins
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you do a body awareness or body-scan check-in? If yes, how long (minutes) and how attentive did you feel (1-9)?

label: Hourly micro-breaks with gentle movement + diaphragmatic breathing
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you take a micro-break (movement + breathing)? If yes, how many times and rate effectiveness (1-9).

label: Threat reappraisal / cognitive reframing practice
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you try a reappraisal/cognitive reframing exercise? If yes, rate how helpful it felt (1-9).

label: Ergonomic / posture cueing and adjustments
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you adjust posture or follow an ergonomic cue (yes/no)? If yes, rate how well you implemented it (1-9).

label: Sleep protection / circadian routine adherence
measurement_item_or_signal: Last night: total sleep time (hrs), sleep quality (1-9), time to fall asleep in minutes. Also capture adherence to planned sleep routine (yes/no).

label: Wearable jaw-clench/bruxism sensor (passive) — episodes & intensity
measurement_channel: wearable device with jaw-clench or EMG proxy (or night bruxism sensor); phone-connected wearable
measurement_item_or_signal: Number of clench/bracing episodes and average intensity in the 'since last prompt' window; daily total episodes and mean intensity.
measurement_scale_or_unit: count of episodes; mean intensity (device-specific units)

label: Structured social support (brief weekly check-ins / encouraging cues)
measurement_channel: smartphone EMA app (weekly check-in + momentary prompts)
measurement_item_or_signal: In the last day(s), did you have a supportive check-in (yes/no)? Rate how supported you felt (1-9).

label: Evening-onset persistent bleak/empty mood
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how empty, heavy, or bleak did you feel? (1 = Not at all, 9 = Extremely)

label: Low outward emotional expression (non-crying distress)
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you feel distressed but not show outward emotion (e.g., not crying)? (1 = Not at all, 9 = Very much)

label: Prolonged passive smartphone use in evenings
measurement_channel: platform API (Android/Apple screen-time/unlock logs) aggregated in-app
measurement_item_or_signal: screen_time_minutes_past_3h (minutes of screen-on/unlocked active time in the 3 hours before the prompt)

label: Perceived low energy / high effort barrier to other activities
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how effortful did it feel to start or do other activities? (1 = Not at all effortful/easy, 9 = Extremely effortful)

label: Avoidant coping function of phone use
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you use your phone to avoid, distract from, or escape unpleasant feelings? (1 = Not at all, 9 = Completely)

label: Evening Behavioral Activation (small planned activities)
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how much did you engage in a planned small activity (pleasant or active)? (1 = Not at all, 9 = A lot)

label: Objective screen-time (past 3 hours)
measurement_channel: platform API (screen-time, unlock logs) aggregated in-app
measurement_item_or_signal: screen_time_minutes_past_3h (minutes of active screen-on/unlocked time in the prior 3 hours); unlock_count_past_3h

label: Sleep / circadian routine (prior night's timing & quality)
measurement_item_or_signal: What time did you fall asleep and wake up last night? How would you rate your sleep quality last night? (1 = Very poor, 9 = Very good)

label: Evening Social Engagement (supportive contact)
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you have a meaningful or supportive social interaction? (1 = Not at all, 9 = A lot)

label: Mindfulness / acceptance coping use
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you use a coping or mindfulness strategy (e.g., deep breaths, grounding)? (1 = Not at all, 9 = A lot)

label: Perceived initiation self-efficacy / momentary ability to start activities
measurement_item_or_signal: Right now / since the last prompt, how able do you feel to start a different (non-phone) activity? (1 = Not at all able, 9 = Completely able)

label: Measurement-feedback engagement (viewed personalized plan/feedback)
measurement_item_or_signal: feedback_viewed_flag_since_last_prompt (binary); feedback_view_count_past_3h

label: Altered sense of self since childbirth
measurement_item_or_signal: Thinking about the period since having your baby, how much do you feel like 'yourself' compared to before the baby? (1 = completely like myself, 9 = not at all like myself)

label: Positive emotional bond with the baby
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how strongly did you feel affectionate/connected to your baby? (1 = not at all, 9 = extremely)

label: Perceived entrapment / loss of autonomy
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you feel trapped or limited by your caregiving role? (1 = not at all, 9 = extremely)

label: Excessive guilt about feelings/parenting
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how guilty did you feel about your feelings or parenting? (1 = not at all, 9 = extremely)

label: Subjective overwhelm / low coping capacity
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how overwhelmed or unable to cope did you feel? (1 = not at all, 9 = completely overwhelmed)

label: Low frustration tolerance / frequent tearfulness
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how tearful or emotionally reactive were you to small triggers? (1 = not at all, 9 = extremely)

label: Self-criticism after emotional episodes
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, after feeling upset, how much did you judge yourself negatively (e.g., 'bad parent')? (1 = not at all, 9 = extremely)

label: Perceived minimization / lack of validation from others
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you feel that others dismissed or minimized how you feel? (1 = not at all, 9 = extremely)

label: Subjective sleep quality (last night)
measurement_item_or_signal: Last night, how well did you sleep overall? (1 = very poorly, 9 = very well)

label: Objective sleep minutes (night)
measurement_channel: phone/wearable sleep tracking (OS/native app or connected wearable)
measurement_item_or_signal: Total sleep minutes last night (device-estimated)

label: Self-compassion practice / self-soothing (use intensity)
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, when you were upset, how compassionate were you toward yourself? (1 = not at all, 9 = extremely)

label: Cognitive reappraisal / thought reframing frequency
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how often did you try to reframe or challenge negative thoughts? (1 = not at all, 9 = very often)

label: Perceived social support / validation
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how supported or understood did you feel by others? (1 = not at all, 9 = completely supported)

label: Respite / childcare hours (available help)
measurement_item_or_signal: Yesterday, how many hours of childcare/respite (by others) did you receive? (enter number of hours)

label: Physical activity (steps per prompt-window)
measurement_item_or_signal: Steps recorded in the window since last prompt (device-derived)

label: Screen time / social media minutes (since last prompt)
measurement_channel: phone screen-time API (minutes per app or aggregated)
measurement_item_or_signal: Minutes of screen time (or social-media app usage) since last prompt

label: Acute somatic symptom intensity and frequency
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how intense were any stomach cramps, nausea, heart racing, or dizziness at their worst? (Rate the worst intensity you felt)

label: Distress from symptom unpredictability
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did unpredictable symptoms (coming without warning) make you feel distressed or upset?

label: Threat interpretation of bodily sensations
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you interpret bodily sensations as indicating something dangerous (e.g., 'this means something is wrong')?

label: Low acceptance of medical reassurance / perceived invalidation
measurement_item_or_signal: Thinking about yesterday and any medical feedback you've had, how much did tests or clinician reassurance reduce your concern? (1 = not at all/reassurance increased mistrust, 9 = reassurance greatly reduced concern)
measurement_scale_or_unit: 1-9 Likert (1=made it worse/none, 9=greatly reduced concern) — note: for model consistent polarity we will invert so higher = worse (low acceptance)

label: Avoidance of leaving home / travel avoidance
measurement_channel: smartphone daily diary (supported by passive GPS)
measurement_item_or_signal: Overall yesterday, to what extent did you avoid going far from home because of fear of symptoms? (1 = did not avoid, 9 = avoided completely)

label: Interoceptive hypervigilance (attention to bodily sensations)
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent were you paying close attention to your bodily sensations (checking, scanning, monitoring)?

label: Functional and emotional impact (annoyance, fear-driven interference)
measurement_item_or_signal: Overall yesterday, how much did symptoms or related behaviors (avoidance, worry) interfere with your daily activities or cause distress?

label: Cognitive reappraisal / threat-interpretation reframing (skill use)
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you use a cognitive reappraisal or reframe (e.g., reinterpreting sensations as non-dangerous)?

label: Interoceptive exposure / somatic experiential practice
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you do any interoceptive exposure or body-focused practice? If yes, rate how much (1=not at all, 9=intense session).

label: Distress-tolerance breathing / downregulation practice
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you use a breathing or grounding technique to manage symptoms? Rate use intensity (1=not at all, 9=very much).

label: Graded behavioral exposure (leaving-home attempts / activation)
measurement_channel: smartphone GPS + smartphone daily diary for intention/effort
measurement_item_or_signal: Passive: max_distance_from_home (meters) in last 24h and per-prompt window. Self-report (daily): rate degree of leaving-home attempt/effort (1-9).
measurement_scale_or_unit: GPS distance in meters (daily); 1-9 Likert for self-report
recall_window: past 24 hours (daily) and per-prompt windows for GPS when available

label: Sleep routine / last-night sleep quality
measurement_item_or_signal: How well did you sleep last night? (1 = very poorly, 9 = very well). Also capture total sleep time estimate (hours).

label: Physical activity (daily steps)
measurement_item_or_signal: Total steps in last 24 hours (phone or wearable-derived)

label: Autonomic arousal: HR-spike counts (wearable)
measurement_channel: consumer wearable (e.g., wrist-worn HR sensor) or phone-based HR if available
measurement_item_or_signal: Count of HR spikes above baseline threshold in each 'since-last-prompt' window (and daily total); also % time above threshold

label: Psychoeducation engagement about somatic sensations
measurement_channel: app engagement logs (module completion) + daily self-report
measurement_item_or_signal: Number of psychoeducation modules completed yesterday (passive) and self-report rating of how helpful the material was (1-9) in morning diary

label: Nighttime replay of past conversations
measurement_item_or_signal: Last night, how much did you replay past conversations in your head as if they were happening now?

label: Nighttime anticipatory worry / list-making
measurement_item_or_signal: Last night, how often did you generate lists or imagine negative outcomes for the near future (e.g., tomorrow)?

label: Nighttime cognitive hyperarousal
measurement_item_or_signal: Last night, how mentally activated or unable to quiet your thoughts did you feel overall?

label: Delayed sleep onset (late sleep timing)
measurement_channel: morning_diary (smartphone EMA app); optional passive sleep-detection
measurement_item_or_signal: What time did you fall asleep last night? (enter HH:MM). If unknown, estimate.
measurement_scale_or_unit: clock time (HH:MM) — will be transformed to minutes-since-midnight and to circular measures

label: Morning interpersonal irritability
measurement_item_or_signal: Right now, how irritated or hostile toward others do you feel?

label: Morning bright light exposure (minutes within 1h of waking)
measurement_item_or_signal: How many minutes did you spend outdoors or in bright indoor light within the first hour after waking?

label: Evening screen minutes (minutes of screen-on in 2h before sleep)
measurement_channel: phone OS screen-time API or smartphone passive logging (minutes of screen-on between bedtime-2h and bedtime)
measurement_item_or_signal: Minutes of screen-on time in the 2 hours before reported bedtime (device-reported).
recall_window: night prior (2-hour window ending at reported bedtime)

label: Evening wind-down routine adherence (1–9)
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you follow your planned wind-down routine?

label: Evening cognitive unloading / expressive journaling (minutes)
measurement_item_or_signal: Did you do a cognitive unloading exercise (journaling/brain-dump) tonight? If yes, how many minutes did you spend?

label: Bed-use / stimulus-control adherence (1–9)
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how well did you avoid non-sleep activities in bed (phone, work, eating)?
measurement_scale_or_unit: 1–9 Likert (1 = not at all, 9 = always avoided)

label: Use of scheduled worry time (1–9)
measurement_item_or_signal: Did you use a scheduled 'worry time' today? (1 = not at all, 9 = fully used as planned)

label: Sleep environment quality (darkness, temperature, noise) 1–9
measurement_item_or_signal: How optimal was your sleep environment last night (darkness, temperature, noise)?

label: Morning stabilization routine (light + gentle activity) 1–9
measurement_item_or_signal: Within the first hour after waking, did you do a morning stabilization routine (light + gentle activity)?

label: Nightmare-triggered awakenings (occurrence)
measurement_item_or_signal: Last night, did you wake because of a nightmare? (0=No ; 1=Yes). If yes: How many nightmare awakenings did you have last night? (enter number) AND How much did the nightmare interrupt your sleep overall? (1–9; 1=not at all, 9=completely)
measurement_scale_or_unit: binary flag + integer count + 1–9 interruption severity

label: Nightmare vividness/intensity
measurement_item_or_signal: If you had a nightmare last night, how vivid/real did it feel? Rate 1–9 (1=not vivid/like a film, 9=extremely vivid and real)

label: Anticipatory fear of sleep / reluctance to go to bed
measurement_item_or_signal: Right now (pre-sleep): How fearful or worried are you about going to sleep because of possible nightmares? Rate 1–9 (1=not at all, 9=extremely fearful)

label: Acute autonomic arousal on awakening
measurement_channel: smartphone EMA app (morning diary) + passive wearable HR
measurement_item_or_signal: When you woke from the nightmare last night, did you experience sweating or racing heart? Rate intensity 1–9 (1=none, 9=extreme). Additionally: wearable-derived peak heart rate in 5-minute window after awakening (bpm) and HRV short-term estimate (RMSSD when available).
measurement_scale_or_unit: 1–9 Likert + beats per minute + HRV estimate (ms)

label: Prolonged post-awakening physiological/psychological activation
measurement_item_or_signal: How long did it take you to feel calm/settled after last night's nightmare awakening? Rate 1–9 where 1=0–2 minutes, 5=15–30 minutes, 9=>60 minutes

label: Difficulty resuming sleep after nightmare awakenings
measurement_item_or_signal: After waking from the nightmare, how difficult was it to fall back asleep? Rate 1–9 (1=fell back asleep immediately, 9=couldn't fall back asleep for long time or not at all). Also: did you eventually return to sleep? (Yes/No)

label: Imagery Rehearsal (nightmare imagery rescripting) practice
measurement_item_or_signal: Today, did you do imagery rehearsal (practice changing nightmare content)? (Yes/No). If yes: How fully did you practice it? Rate 1–9 (1=brief/partial, 9=complete session). How many minutes did you practice?

label: Presleep wind-down / sleep routine adherence
measurement_item_or_signal: Tonight, how well did you follow your wind-down routine? Rate 1–9 (1=not at all, 9=fully). Did you avoid stimulating content and devices in the hour before bed? (Yes/No)

label: Post-awakening grounding and paced-breathing practice
measurement_channel: smartphone EMA app (morning diary) + optional event-trigger
measurement_item_or_signal: After the awakening, did you use grounding or paced breathing? (Yes/No). If yes: Rate how long/intense (1–9; 1=brief, 9=full practice).

label: Sleep environment optimization (light/noise/temperature/comfort)
measurement_channel: smartphone EMA app (morning diary) + optional passive phone ambient light/noise if available
measurement_item_or_signal: Rate last night's bedroom comfort/optimization (temperature, light, noise, mattress) overall 1–9 (1=very poor, 9=excellent). Optional: was a low-light bathroom path used? (Yes/No)

label: HRV / slow-breathing biofeedback practice and passive HRV monitoring
measurement_channel: wearable device (heart rate, accelerometry) + smartphone app for practice logging
measurement_item_or_signal: Passive: nightly mean HR, peak HR in awakening windows, and RMSSD per-night. EMA: Did you practice HRV biofeedback today? (Yes/No) If yes, duration minutes and perceived effectiveness 1–9.
measurement_scale_or_unit: HR bpm, HRV ms; binary + minutes + 1–9
recall_window: daily aggregate (last 24 hours) and per-awakening windows

label: Stimulus-control / non-clock-checking and bed association
measurement_channel: smartphone EMA app (morning diary / event if awakened)
measurement_item_or_signal: Last night, did you check the clock or your phone during awakenings? (Yes/No). How often? Rate 1–9 frequency (1=never, 9=very often). Did you get out of bed if unable to sleep? (Yes/No)

label: Wearable sleep/arousal monitoring with feedback
measurement_item_or_signal: Per-night: number of device-detected awakenings, total awake minutes, peak HR in awakening windows (bpm), nightly mean HR, and estimated sleep stages if available.
measurement_scale_or_unit: counts (awakenings), minutes awake, bpm, HRV when available
recall_window: nightly aggregate aligned to morning diary

label: Failure to initiate intended task
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, when you sat down to begin a planned task, how much did you actually start the intended task within a few minutes? (1 = Not at all, 9 = Immediately and fully)

label: Substitution with low-effort rewarding activities
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you engage in easier, immediately rewarding activities (e.g., reorganizing photos, watching videos) instead of the task you intended? (1 = Not at all, 9 = A lot)

label: Susceptibility to distraction by digital/novel stimuli
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how often did your attention get captured by phones/apps/novel stimuli interfering with the intended task? (1 = Not at all, 9 = Constantly)

label: Loss of time awareness during off-task activity
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you lose track of time while doing other activities (i.e., time passed faster than expected)? (1 = Not at all, 9 = A great deal)

label: Acute panic/anxiety when deadlines are noticed
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how anxious or panicked did you feel specifically because of deadlines or time pressure? (1 = Not at all, 9 = Extremely)

label: Uncertainty and self-blame about cause of difficulties
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you feel unsure if this was laziness versus a fixable problem, and blame yourself? (1 = Not at all, 9 = Strongly uncertain/blaming)

label: Implementation intentions / task-initiation cues
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you form a specific if-then plan to start the next task? (1 = Not at all specific, 9 = Very specific/actionable)

label: Structured focus blocks and micro-task timers
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you use a timer or micro-task structure to focus? (1 = Not at all, 9 = Consistently used and adhered to)

label: Digital distraction (passive phone metrics: screen time and pickups)
measurement_channel: smartphone OS usage stats (screen_time_minutes, unlock_count) aggregated to EMA windows
measurement_item_or_signal: screen_time_minutes in past ~3 hours; unlock_count in past ~3 hours (collected via OS usage API; content not captured)

label: Time-awareness checks / time-estimation practice
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how often did you check the time or use a countdown to monitor elapsed time? (1 = Not at all, 9 = Constantly)

label: Contingency planning / deadline reframing (cognitive restructuring)
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you do any contingency planning or reframe upcoming deadlines (e.g., plan next steps, reappraise) ? (1 = Not at all, 9 = Very much)

label: Self-compassion / uncertainty-processing practice
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you practice self-compassion or intentionally reduce self-blame? (1 = Not at all, 9 = Very much)

label: External cognitive offloading / checklists
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, to what extent did you use an external checklist or offloading tool to start/structure the task? (1 = Not at all, 9 = Used and followed closely)

label: Current energy / alertness level
measurement_item_or_signal: Right now (since the last prompt), how would you rate your energy/alertness? (1 = Exhausted, 9 = Very high energy)

label: Last-night sleep quality and duration (morning diary)
measurement_channel: morning diary in smartphone EMA app
measurement_item_or_signal: Last night: how many hours did you sleep? ______ minutes. How would you rate your sleep quality? (1 = Very poor, 9 = Very good)
